body_txt: At least one character in the love triangle needs to be gay or bisexual for this to work, barring some very unusual circumstances. For that reason, it's most commonly seen in works with lots of LGBT characters, such as Fanfiction , New Media , and the yaoi / yuri genre. Commonly overlaps with Bisexual Love Triangle , as well as Marry Them All (if the hypotenuse sticks around).
